title: stelis excentrica
intro: Stelis excentrica, also known as the excentric stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis excentrica include relief from fever, sore throats, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Stelis excentrica is often combined with other plants to create infusions or decoctions that can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
